tracks.meaning: a hypertext connection between web pages or digital resources that allows navigation when clicked
a connection or relationship between people, organizations, or ideas
to connect or join two or more things together
a series of connected bones or rings forming a flexible chain, particularly in the spine
a segment of a chain or a connected series forming part of a larger structure
a continuous band of metal or rubber plates forming the treads of a tank or tracked vehicle
a chain or rope used to secure a vessel or connect parts of a ship
to establish or maintain a connection between computer networks or devices
a connection or relationship that suggests involvement or responsibility in a legal matter
a person with whom one has a connection or relationship, often useful or influential
a connection between genes or chromosomes that are inherited together
a connection between financial institutions or accounts for transferring funds electronically
